top3.sql:
WITH daily_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        DATE(txn_date) AS txn_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS daily_net
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, DATE(txn_date)
),
running_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        SUM(daily_net) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_balance
    FROM daily_balances
),...
